'''yachaya''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:nicety|nicety]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-ch-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nicety|nicety]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| yachaya
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:yæchæyæth|yæchæyæth]] || [[word:yæchæyæj|yæchæyæj]] || [[word:yæchæyæsh|yæchæyæsh]] || [[word:yæchæyæ|yæchæyæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:yachachayath|yachachayath]] || [[word:yachachayaj|yachachayaj]] || [[word:yachachayash|yachachayash]] || [[word:yachachaya|yachachaya]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:yachayath|yachayath]] || [[word:yachayaj|yachayaj]] || [[word:yachayash|yachayash]] || [[word:yachaya|yachaya]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:yachafyafth|yachafyafth]] || [[word:yachafyafj|yachafyafj]] || [[word:yachafyafsh|yachafyafsh]] || [[word:yachafyaf|yachafyaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:yachayatha|yachayatha]] || [[word:yachayaja|yachayaja]] || [[word:yachayasha|yachayasha]] || [[word:yachayaka|yachayaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:yachayath|yachayath]] || [[word:yachayaj|yachayaj]] || [[word:yachayash|yachayash]] || [[word:yachaya|yachaya]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:yachayathal|yachayathal]] || [[word:yachayajal|yachayajal]] || [[word:yachayashal|yachayashal]] || [[word:yachayakal|yachayakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:yachayaathatha|yachayaathatha]] || [[word:yachayaajaja|yachayaajaja]] || [[word:yachayaashasha|yachayaashasha]] || [[word:yachayaaka|yachayaaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:yachayathan|yachayathan]] || [[word:yachayajan|yachayajan]] || [[word:yachayashan|yachayashan]] || [[word:yachayakan|yachayakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:yachayathaoro|yachayathaoro]] || [[word:yachayajaoro|yachayajaoro]] || [[word:yachayashaoro|yachayashaoro]] || [[word:yachayakaoro|yachayakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|307a66b}}
